status.note: Confirmed via plan pipeline_attach_reentry. Preserve entry classification, open-QA writeback, and stage rewind fail-closed codes.

skill.name: pipeline-attachment-and-reentry
skill.summary: Unify new project / new milestones / scattered task / continue / midstream change attachment and stage rewind onto the lifecycle board.
skill.purpose: Keep digressions and mid-pipeline requirement changes from skipping writeback or leaving later stages falsely done.
triggers: 进度 / 下一步 / 继续流水线

constraints.text: Every project-bound attach turn classifies exactly one entry_kind.
Confirmed midstream_change without writeback/rewind/board fails closed.
Early requirement changes during Plan/Implement must rewind stages; no oral patch then keep coding.
